comment: Reviewed-and-accepted Layer-1 audit findings. Every entry was examined by a human/CE and classified. The gate fails ONLY on findings not covered here — new unclaimed diffs always block. Remove entries when the underlying limitation is fixed.

entries.reason: page-citation cluster; range+cardinal rows fired correctly, word-diff hunk association fails on the paren shift
vote-tally table; per-number rows claimed, alignment scrambles hunks. Proper fix: source should tag tallies {{count:...}}
Bamini-mojibake footer token adjacent to page number
reference number 2026-223 read as a range — the known IDs-vs-ranges ambiguity; cure is tagging, not a heuristic change
